title: Obedience
question: Did I disobey my mom, dad, or the adults taking care of me?
description: CCC 2217; Exodus 20:12 — God asks us to honor and obey our parents.

title: Truth
question: Did I tell a lie instead of telling the truth?
description: CCC 2483; Proverbs 12:22 — God loves it when we are honest.

title: Kindness
question: Was I mean to someone — did I hit, push, call names, or say hurtful things?
description: CCC 2302; Matthew 5:22 — Jesus wants us to be kind to everyone.

title: Kindness
question: Did I leave someone out on purpose or refuse to play with them to be mean?
description: CCC 2303; John 13:34 — Jesus said to love one another.

title: Justice
question: Did I take something that was not mine without asking?
description: CCC 2408; Exodus 20:15 — We must not steal; we should always ask first.

title: Love of Neighbor
question: Was I mean to my brothers or sisters, or did I start a fight with them?
description: CCC 2303; 1 John 4:20 — If we say we love God, we must love our family too.

title: Love Of God
question: Did I behave badly at Mass or not pay attention on purpose?
description: CCC 2181; Exodus 20:8 — Sunday Mass is a special time to be with God.

title: Prayer Life
question: Did I forget to say my prayers, or did I not try to talk to God?
description: CCC 2744; Luke 18:1 — God wants us to talk to Him every day.

title: Reverence for God
question: Did I use God's name or Jesus' name as a bad word?
description: CCC 2162; Exodus 20:7 — God's name is holy and should be spoken with love.

title: Forgiveness
question: Did I refuse to forgive someone or stay angry at them on purpose?
description: CCC 2840; Matthew 6:14-15 — Jesus asks us to forgive others, just as God forgives us.
